name: Comprehend Languages
description: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language that you hear. You also understand any written language that you see.
effect: You comprehend all spoken and written languages for 1 hour. You can also read any cipher or code, though magical secrecy may still conceal the meaning.
notes: Can be cast as a ritual (add 10 minutes to casting time) — saves the mana cost.
You understand language but cannot speak it.
